assertions.title: Cmd+K opens and closes command palette

steps.expected: Command palette opens with focused input
steps.observed: Toolbar search input focused; no command-palette/dialog rendered
Search input remained focused; no open/close palette state

assertions.issues: Cmd+K does not open a command palette; only focuses the toolbar search input (dialogs count observed as 0).

assertions.title: Command palette search filters and selects employees

steps.observed: Main view filtered by toolbar search; no palette/results list shown
No selectable command results; no palette selection action available

assertions.issues: Command-palette result list/selection behavior is absent.

assertions.title: Delete/Backspace triggers employee deletion with confirmation

steps.action: Select single employee and press Backspace
Multi-select two employees and press Backspace
steps.expected: Bulk delete dialog appears with count

steps.action: In Hierarchy, use ArrowDown then ArrowUp
steps.observed: Selected detail changed Key Eng Manager -> Carol Key -> Key Eng Manager

steps.action: Select Key CEO, press ArrowRight then ArrowLeft
steps.expected: Right moves to first child/expands; Left moves to parent/collapses
steps.observed: Selection changed Key CEO -> Key Eng Manager -> Key CEO

assertions.title: Shortcuts do not conflict with browser defaults

steps.action: Press Backspace in Hierarchy with a selected employee
steps.expected: Delete workflow appears; browser does not navigate back
steps.observed: Delete dialog opened and URL remained /hierarchy

steps.action: Confirm delete, then press Cmd+Z outside text input
steps.observed: Employee removed then restored via Cmd+Z; URL remained /hierarchy

steps.expected: Shortcut handled by app instead of browser omnibox
steps.observed: App search field focused; no route/navigation change

evidence.network: No requests captured during this exact step (intermittent agent-browser request capture limitation).

assertions.title: Shortcuts are inert inside text inputs

steps.action: Focus toolbar search input and use letters/backspace/arrow keys
steps.expected: Keys edit text only; no shortcut side effects
steps.observed: Search value became 'BZo'; no delete dialog/shortcut action triggered

steps.action: Enter inline name edit and type/backspace
steps.expected: Text editing occurs without global shortcut firing
steps.observed: Inline input remained active; no delete dialog; Escape restored original text

assertions.title: Shortcuts work across all 5 views

steps.action: Press Cmd+K from OrgChart, Hierarchy, Spreadsheet, Kanban, and Compare
steps.expected: Command palette opens in each view
steps.observed: In all views, toolbar search input focused but no command palette/dialog appeared (dialogs count 0)

steps.action: Edit CEO title in OrgChart, switch to Compare, press Cmd+Z
steps.expected: Undo works from non-originating active view
steps.observed: Cmd+Z in Compare reverted title change successfully

evidence.network: PATCH /api/employees/69e19fa92bce4b5d49117894 observed for edit and undo during cross-view Cmd+Z verification.

assertions.issues: Cross-view Cmd+Z worked, but Cmd+K did not open command palette in any view (focuses toolbar search instead).

frictions.description: `agent-browser network requests` intermittently returned no entries for flows that should hit API endpoints.
frictions.resolution: Relied on UI state transitions/screenshots and captured request evidence where available later in-session.

frictions.description: Some cursor-interactive row refs intermittently reported as blocked despite visible rows.
frictions.resolution: Re-snapshotted and used keyboard row selection (ArrowDown) and alternative element targets.

summary: Tested 7 keyboard assertions: 4 passed (VAL-KEY-003,004,005,006) and 3 failed (VAL-KEY-001,002,007). Primary gap: Cmd+K behavior does not match command-palette contract (focuses toolbar search input, no dialog/results UI).
